1.2.77.name: TooB Amp
1.2.77.author: Robin Davies
1.2.77.description: A set of high-quality guitar effect plugins for Raspberry Pi with specific support for PiPedal, including a dedicated Neural Amp Modeler
1.2.77.changes:
Experimental release for field testing.

- Fixes for ALSA crashes when using TooB Cab IR, or TooB Convolution Reverb with buffer sizes smaller than 64 samples.
- Revised layouts for Native UI layouts to avoid scrolling at default sizes.
